config.title: Moduł Serwisowy (edycja 2018)
config.script:
'messagebox #include "50122" #include "50208"
'asp_raport_appfile #include "50518"
'setglobprof #include "50203"
'nx_trace #include "50519"
#include "50517"
#include "50211"
'initialize_transaction_oper #include "50525"
function fopen() page_.ctrl(CTRLID_SYMBOL_KONTA).value = "like '201%'" page_.ctrl(CTRLID_DATA_TRANSAKCJI).value = "between {d '2018-01-01'} and {d '2018-12-31'}" fopen = true end function
function setup_transaction dim strSymbol: strSymbol = page_.ctrl(CTRLID_SYMBOL_KONTA).value dim strDataTrans: strDataTrans = page_.ctrl(CTRLID_DATA_TRANSAKCJI).value
dim pM60182: set pM60182 = doc_.getmodule(60182) dim where_str: where_str = " and d.dDataKsieg between " +_ trans_.afc.convert.date2SQL(pM60182.RokKsiegowy_Poczatek()) + " and " +_ trans_.afc.convert.date2SQL(pM60182.RokKsiegowy_Koniec())
dim strSQL strSQL = "select max(k.IdObj) idKonto,max(k.strSymbol) symbol,t.IdObj idTrans,max(t.strSymTrans) symbol_trans, " + vbNewLine +_ "sum(d.curwn)-sum(d.curma) saldo_dekret, " + vbNewLine +_ "(select sum(trop_curWn)-sum(trop_curMa) from n5transakcja_operacja where trop_pTransakcja = t.IdObj and trop_dDataOp " + strDataTrans + ") saldo_trans " + vbNewLine +_ "from " + vbNewLine +_ "n5dekret d " + vbNewLine +_ "inner join n5konto k on d.pkonto = k.IdObj " + vbNewLine +_ "inner join n5transakcja t on d.ptransakcja = t.IdObj " + vbNewLine +_ "where k.strSymbol " + strSymbol + " and d.ddataksieg " + strDataTrans + " and t.dDataRozp " + strDataTrans + where_str + vbNewLine +_ "group by t.IdObj " + vbNewLine +_ "having (sum(d.curwn)-sum(d.curma)) <> (select sum(trop_curWn)-sum(trop_curMa) from n5transakcja_operacja where trop_pTransakcja = t.IdObj and trop_dDataOp " + strDataTrans + ")" dim pPerf : set pPerf = doc_.performing("Trwa przygotowywanie danych...") dim oRS: set oRS = trans_.createadors(strSQL) set pPerf = nothing
dim pMsgPage: set pMsgPage = doc_.getmodule(60340) dim iResultPotw : iResultPotw = pMsgPage.buildPotw(oRS)
if iResultPotw = vbOK then oRS.movefirst
do while not oRS.EOF
dim curWn: curWn = ccur(0) dim curMa: curMa = ccur(0) dim curRoznica: curRoznica = ccur(oRS("saldo_dekret").value) - ccur(oRS("saldo_trans").value) if curRoznica < ccur(0) then curMa = abs(curRoznica) else curWn = curRoznica end if
dim oTransOper,oTrans dim idTrans: idTrans = clng(oRS("idTrans").value) if idTrans > clng(0) then set oTrans = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5TRANSAKCJA,idTrans) initialize_transaction_oper oTrans, oTransOper oTransOper.trop_curWn = curWn oTransOper.trop_curMa = curMa oTransOper.trop_strOpis = "uzgodnienie" if not trans_.saveobjects() then end if end if
oRS.movenext loop end if
end function
function document_file_copy 'ścieżka zapius dim strPath: strPath = "c:\temp\files\"
on error resume next dim pFD, bOK set pFD = CFileDrive(bOK) if (bOK) then if (not pFD.IsFolder(strPath)) then if (not pFD.CreateFolder(strPath)) then exit function end if end if end if on error goto 0
'pobierz wszystkie dokumenty dim pCursorDocs set pCursorDocs = trans_.createrawcursor(TYPEID_N5DOKUMENT, "", "", "") dim oDokument dim pPerf : set pPerf = doc_.performing("Trwa kopiowanie dokumentów do lokalizacji: " + strPath) for each oDokument in pCursorDocs on error resume next if (not oDokument.fPlik.isEmpty()) then dim strFilePath: strFilePath = strPath + CStr(oDokument.IdObj) + "." + oDokument.fPlik.ext pPerf.text = "Trwa kopiowanie dokumentów do lokalizacji: " + strFilePath oDokument.fPlik.save strFilePath end if on error goto 0 next set pPerf = nothing
end function
function gm_ensure_accuracy_ui(bShowInfo) dim t_start_all, t_end t_start_all = Timer
dim pSubTrans: set pSubTrans = trans_.createsubtran() dim pPerf : set pPerf = doc_.performing("Aktualizacja stanów magazynowych...")
dim varLog : set varLog = doc_.createstreamobj() gm_ensure_accuracy_ui = gm_ensure_accuracy_internal(varLog)
dim iDummy : iDummy = getglobprofileLong(GLOBPROF_DUMMY_UPDATE) setglobprofile GLOBPROF_DUMMY_UPDATE,iDummy+1 'commit if successfull or force failure if not if true then trans_.saveobjects else trans_.save trans_.discard() end if
set pSubTrans = nothing set pPerf = nothing
t_end = Timer
#ifdef APPCONFIG_SHOW_EXEC_TIME trans_.message 0,0,"Operacja D, całkowity czas wykonania:" + cstr(t_end - t_start_all) #endif
if bShowInfo and not gm_ensure_accuracy_ui then if MessageBox("Wykryto braki w magazynie. Czy wyświetlić raport ?","Aktualizacja stanów magazynowych",vbYesNo,vbQuestion) = vbYes then NX_TRACE_START_STREAM("Aktualizacja stanów magazynowych",nothing) gm_log_2_msg varLog NX_TRACE_SHOW_LOG(1) end if end if
end function
'-------------------------------------------------- '----- funkcja dla obiektu n5ptop, n5ptstan ----- '-------------------------------------------------- function pt_ensure_accuracy_ui(bDummy) dim pSubTrans: set pSubTrans = trans_.createsubtran() dim pPerf : set pPerf = doc_.performing("Aktualizacja stanów płatności...")
dim varLog : set varLog = doc_.createstreamobj() pt_ensure_accuracy_ui = pt_ensure_accuracy_internal(varLog)
dim iDummy : iDummy = getglobprofileLong(GLOBPROF_DUMMY_UPDATE) setglobprofile GLOBPROF_DUMMY_UPDATE,iDummy+1 'commit if successfull or force failure if not if true then trans_.saveobjects else trans_.save trans_.discard() end if
set pSubTrans = nothing set pPerf = nothing
if not pt_ensure_accuracy_ui then NX_TRACE_START_STREAM("Aktualizacja stanów płatności",nothing) NX_TRACE_SHOW_LOG(1) end if
end function
'------------------------------------------------------------------------- #define TMP_STANMAG_TABLE_NAME #tmp_stanmag_moment
class CStanMagHelper private bDisposed
private sub class_initialize() bDisposed = false
dim strSQL strSQL = "create table TMP_STANMAG_TABLE_NAME " + vbCrLf +_ "(" + vbCrLf +_ "tsm_pMagazyn integer not null," + vbCrLf +_ "tsm_pProdukt integer not null," + vbCrLf +_ "tsm_pOpak integer not null," + vbCrLf +_ "tsm_curCena decimal(14,4) not null," + vbCrLf +_ "tsm_curIloscOpakB decimal(14,4) not null," + vbCrLf +_ "tsm_curWartoscB decimal(12,2) not null," + vbCrLf +_ "tsm_curIloscOpakPI decimal(14,4) not null," + vbCrLf +_ "tsm_curWartoscPI decimal(12,2) not null," + vbCrLf +_ "tsm_curIloscOpakRI decimal(14,4) not null," + vbCrLf +_ "tsm_curWartoscRI decimal(12,2) not null," + vbCrLf +_ "PRIMARY KEY (tsm_pMagazyn, tsm_pProdukt, tsm_pOpak, tsm_curCena)" + vbCrLf +_ ")" + vbCrLf
trans_.execsql strSQL end sub
public sub manual_done() if not bDisposed then bDisposed = true
dim strSQL strSQL = "drop table TMP_STANMAG_TABLE_NAME" + vbCrLf trans_.execsql strSQL
end if end sub
private sub class_terminate() 'OK manual_done() end sub
public sub prefill() dim strSQL : strSQL = "insert into TMP_STANMAG_TABLE_NAME " +_ "select distinct gmo_pMag, gmo_pProd, gmo_pOpak, gmo_curCena,0,0,0,0,0,0 from n5gmop" trans_.execsql strSQL end sub
'-- stan ilościowy / wartosciowy na dany moment public sub fill_stan_na_moment(byval nNumOpEnd,byval bDetails) dim strSQL : strSQL = "insert into TMP_STANMAG_TABLE_NAME select gmo_pMag, gmo_pProd, gmo_pOpak," if bDetails then strSQL = strSQL + "gmo_curCena" else strSQL = strSQL + "0" end if strSQL = strSQL + ",sum(gmo_curIlosc),sum(gmo_curWartosc),0,0,0,0 from n5gmop " +_ "where gmo_nNumOp <=" + cstr(nNumOpEnd) + " group by gmo_pMag, gmo_pProd, gmo_pOpak" if bDetails then strSQL = strSQL + "gmo_curCena" end if trans_.execsql strSQL end sub
public sub exec_tmp_stanmag_moment(byval nNumOpStart,byval nNumOpEnd) dim strSQL strSQL = "exec n5stanmag_fill_timerange " + cstr(nNumOpStart) + "," + cstr(nNumOpEnd)
trans_.execsql strSQL end sub end class
'------------------------------------------------------------------------- function new_stan_mag_helper set new_stan_mag_helper = new CStanMagHelper end function '-------------------------------------------------------------------------
function sql_prepare_tmp_stanmag_moment() dim strSQL
strSQL = "create table #tmp_stanmag_moment " + vbCrLf +_ "(" + vbCrLf +_ "pMagazyn integer not null," + vbCrLf +_ "pProdukt integer not null," + vbCrLf +_ "pOpak integer not null," + vbCrLf +_ "curIloscOpakB decimal(14,4) not null," + vbCrLf +_ "curIloscOpakPI decimal(14,4) not null," + vbCrLf +_ "curIloscOpakRI decimal(14,4) not null," + vbCrLf +_ "curWartoscB decimal(12,2) not null," + vbCrLf +_ "curWartoscPI decimal(12,2) not null," + vbCrLf +_ "curWartoscRI decimal(12,2) not null," + vbCrLf +_ "PRIMARY KEY (pMagazyn, pProdukt, pOpak)" + vbCrLf +_ ")" + vbCrLf
trans_.execsql strSQL
strSQL="create index pokaz_daty_n5dokmag on N5DOKMAG (DDATAWYST ASC)" + vbCrLf
trans_.execsql strSQL
end function
function sql_exec_tmp_stanmag_moment(byval nNumOpStart,byval nNumOpEnd) dim strSQL strSQL = "exec n5stanmag_fill_timerange " + cstr(nNumOpStart) + "," + cstr(nNumOpEnd)
trans_.execsql strSQL end function
function sql_clean_tmp_stanmag_moment() dim strSQL strSQL = "drop table #tmp_stanmag_moment" + vbCrLf trans_.execsql strSQL
strSQL="drop index n5dokmag.pokaz_daty_n5dokmag " + vbCrLf
trans_.execsql strSQL
end function
'------------------------------------------------------------------------- function sql_find_mag_min_max_nr_4date(byval tablename, byref min_value, byref max_value, byval where_str) sql_find_mag_min_max_nr_4date = false
dim sql : sql = "select min(nNumOper),max(nNumOper) from " + tablename + " where " + where_str
dim pRecordset set pRecordset = trans_.createadors(sql)
if not pRecordset.EOF then min_value = pRecordset.fields(0).value max_value = pRecordset.fields(1).value sql_find_mag_min_max_nr_4date = true end if
pRecordset.close set pRecordset = nothing
end function
'' GetMin - zwraca minimum function GetMin(byval param1, byval param2)
if param1 < param2 then GetMin = param1 else GetMin = param2 end if
end function
'' zwraca min(min1 lub min2) '' wartości NULL są pomijane function GetMinNotNull(byval param1, byval param2) GetMinNotNull = null
if not isnull(param1) then if not isnull(param2) then GetMinNotNull = GetMin(param1,param2) else GetMinNotNull = param1 end if elseif not isnull(param2) then GetMinNotNull = param2 end if
end function
function GetMax(byval param1, byval param2)
if param1 > param2 then GetMax = param1 else GetMax = param2 end if
end function
function GetMaxNotNull(byval param1, byval param2) GetMaxNotNull = null
if not isnull(param1) then if not isnull(param2) then GetMaxNotNull = GetMax(param1,param2) else GetMaxNotNull = param1 end if elseif not isnull(param2) then GetMaxNotNull = param2 end if
end function
''''''
function convert_date_range_to_num_oper_range(byval where_str,byref nNumOpStart,byref nNumOpEnd)
convert_date_range_to_num_oper_range = false
dim dokmag_min : dokmag_min = null dim dokmag_max : dokmag_max = null sql_find_mag_min_max_nr_4date "n5dokmag",dokmag_min,dokmag_max,where_str
dim realprod_min : realprod_min = null dim realprod_max : realprod_max = null sql_find_mag_min_max_nr_4date "n5realprod",realprod_min,realprod_max,where_str
nNumOpStart = GetMinNotNull(dokmag_min, realprod_min) nNumOpEnd = GetMaxNotNull(dokmag_max, realprod_max)
if not (isnull(nNumOpStart) or isnull(nNumOpEnd)) then convert_date_range_to_num_oper_range = true else if isnull(nNumOpStart) then nNumOpStart = clng(0) end if if isnull(nNumOpEnd) then nNumOpEnd = clng(999999999) end if end if
end function
#comment '------------------------------------------------------- #comment '------- funkcje serwisowe ----------------------------- #comment '-------------------------------------------------------
function rebuild_gm_from_dokmag_auto()
dim oDokRangeRS : set oDokRangeRS = trans_.createadors( _ "select idobj from n5dokmag where dm_cZmianaEksport <> 0 order by nNumOper")
trans_.autorollback false
dim bAny : bAny = false do while not oDokRangeRS.EOF dim idDM : idDM = clng(oDokRangeRS(0)) dim oDokMag : set oDokMag = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5DOKMAG, idDM) trans_.execsql "delete from n5gmop where gmo_nNumOp = " + cstr(oDokMag.nnumoper) oDokMag.n5dokmag_rebuild_gm true oDokRangeRS.MoveNext bAny = true loop
if bAny then setglobprofile GLOBPROF_GM_BORDER,GM_BORDER_ALL_BAD rebuild_gm_from_dokmag_auto = trans_.saveobjects() end if
end function
#comment '-------- odbudowa stanów magazynowych z dokumentów ---- #comment '-------- ( rekordów n5gmop z n5dokmag i n5realprod) ---- #comment '-------- może być przydatne w przypadku gdy nie zgadzają się ilości, nie widać operacji -----
function rebuild_gm_from_dokmag_range(byval nStartNumOp,byval nEndNumOp) rebuild_gm_from_dokmag_range = false
dim oDokRangeRS : set oDokRangeRS = trans_.createadors( _ "select idobj from n5dokmag where nNumOper between " +_ cstr(nStartNumOp) + " and " + cstr(nEndNumOp) + " order by nNumOper")
trans_.autorollback false
do while not oDokRangeRS.EOF dim idDM : idDM = clng(oDokRangeRS(0)) trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5DOKMAG,idDM).n5dokmag_rebuild_gm true oDokRangeRS.MoveNext loop
rebuild_gm_from_dokmag_range = trans_.saveobjects() end function
function rebuild_pt_from_platnosc_range(byval nStartNumOp,byval nEndNumOp) rebuild_pt_from_platnosc_range = false
'dokonaj rebuild dokumentów tylko z obcą walutą dim oDokRangeRS : set oDokRangeRS = trans_.createadors( _ "select * from n5platnosc p " +_ "inner join n5jednostka j on p.pWalutaPodm = j.idobj " +_ "where nNumOper between " + cstr(nStartNumOp) + " and " + cstr(nEndNumOp) +_ " and j.strSkrot <> 'PLN' and j.eTyp = N5JEDNOSTKA_WALUTA " +_ "order by nNumOper")
trans_.autorollback false
do while not oDokRangeRS.EOF dim idDM : idDM = clng(oDokRangeRS(0)) trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PLATNOSC,idDM).n5platnosc_rebuild_pt true oDokRangeRS.MoveNext loop
rebuild_pt_from_platnosc_range = trans_.saveobjects() end function
function rebuild_gm_from_realprod_range(byval nStartNumOp,byval nEndNumOp) rebuild_gm_from_realprod_range = false
dim oDokRangeRS : set oDokRangeRS = trans_.createadors( _ "select idobj from n5realprod where nNumOper between " +_ cstr(nStartNumOp) + " and " + cstr(nEndNumOp) + " order by nNumOper")
trans_.autorollback false
do while not oDokRangeRS.EOF dim idDM : idDM = clng(oDokRangeRS(0)) trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5REALPROD,idDM).n5realprod_rebuild_gm oDokRangeRS.MoveNext loop
rebuild_gm_from_realprod_range = trans_.saveobjects() end function
#define SINGLE_REBUILD_STEP_SIZE 199
function rebuid_gm_from_dokmag() rebuid_gm_from_dokmag = false trans_.execsql "truncate table n5gmop" trans_.execsql "truncate table n5gmstan" dim oRangeRS set oRangeRS = trans_.createadors("select isnull(min(nNumOper),0),isnull(max(nNumOper),0) from n5dokmag") dim nNumOp dim nEndNumOp nNumOp = clng(oRangeRS(0)) nEndNumOp = clng(oRangeRS(1))
'n5dokmag dim pPerf set pPerf = doc_.performing("Odbudowa stanów magazynowych...")
do while nNumOp <= nEndNumOp if not rebuild_gm_from_dokmag_range(nNumOp,nNumOp + SINGLE_REBUILD_STEP_SIZE) then exit function end if
nNumOp = nNumOp + SINGLE_REBUILD_STEP_SIZE + 1 pPerf.text = "Odbudowa stanów magazynowych, operacje " + cstr(nNumOp) + "..." + cstr(nNumOp + SINGLE_REBUILD_STEP_SIZE) + _ " z " + cstr(nEndNumOp) loop
'n5realprod set pPerf = doc_.performing("Odbudowa produkcji...")
set oRangeRS = trans_.createadors("select isnull(min(nNumOper),0),isnull(max(nNumOper),0) from n5realprod") nNumOp = clng(oRangeRS(0)) nEndNumOp = clng(oRangeRS(1))
do while nNumOp < nEndNumOp if not rebuild_gm_from_realprod_range(nNumOp,nNumOp + SINGLE_REBUILD_STEP_SIZE) then exit function end if
nNumOp = nNumOp + SINGLE_REBUILD_STEP_SIZE + 1 pPerf.text = "Odbudowa produkcji, operacje " + cstr(nNumOp) + "..." + cstr(nNumOp + SINGLE_REBUILD_STEP_SIZE) + _ " z " + cstr(nEndNumOp) loop
setglobprofile GLOBPROF_GM_BORDER,GM_BORDER_ALL_BAD rebuid_gm_from_dokmag = trans_.saveobjects() end function
function rebuid_pt_from_platnosc() rebuid_pt_from_platnosc = false trans_.execsql "truncate table n5ptop" trans_.execsql "truncate table n5ptstan" dim oRangeRS set oRangeRS = trans_.createadors("select isnull(min(nNumOper),0),isnull(max(nNumOper),0) from n5platnosc") dim nNumOp dim nEndNumOp nNumOp = clng(oRangeRS(0)) nEndNumOp = clng(oRangeRS(1))
'n5platnosc dim pPerf set pPerf = doc_.performing("Odbudowa stanów płatności...")
do while nNumOp <= nEndNumOp if not rebuild_pt_from_platnosc_range(nNumOp,nNumOp + SINGLE_REBUILD_STEP_SIZE) then exit function end if
nNumOp = nNumOp + SINGLE_REBUILD_STEP_SIZE + 1 pPerf.text = "Odbudowa stanów płatności, operacje " + cstr(nNumOp) + "..." + cstr(nNumOp + SINGLE_REBUILD_STEP_SIZE) + _ " z " + cstr(nEndNumOp) loop setglobprofile GLOBPROF_PLATNOSC_NUMER, nEndNumOp setglobprofile GLOBPROF_PT_BORDER,GM_BORDER_ALL_BAD rebuid_pt_from_platnosc = trans_.saveobjects() end function
#comment '-------- ręczne sprawdzenie poprawności (system to sam też robi) ----
function manual_gm_ensure_accuracy() gm_ensure_accuracy_ui(true) page_.goback end function
#comment '-------- wymuszenie przebiegu uporzadkowania od początku z istniejących n5gmop ---- #comment '-------- może być przydatne w przypadku gdy nie zgadzają się ceny lub wartości -----
function force_rebuild_gm() dim pNAVOGMSrvr : set pNAVOGMSrvr = trans_.CreateServerExtension("navogm.n5gmsvr") dim varLog 'ma być pusty jeśli nie chcemy logować set varLog = doc_.createstreamobj()
' trans_.execsql "truncate table n5gmstan"
if not pNAVOGMSrvr.forcerepair(varLog) then if MessageBox("Wykryto braki w magazynie. Czy wyświetlić raport ?","Aktualizacja stanów magazynowych",vbYesNo,vbQuestion) = vbYes then NX_TRACE_START_STREAM("Aktualizacja stanów magazynowych",nothing) gm_log_2_msg varLog NX_TRACE_SHOW_LOG(1) end if else setglobprofile GLOBPROF_GM_BORDER,GM_BORDER_ALL_RIGHT trans_.saveobjects end if page_.goback end function
'--------------------------------- 'odbudowa operacji na transakcjach '--------------------------------- function rebuid_trop() if MessageBox("Zostaną usunięte wszysktie operacje na transakcjach i wygenerowane od nowa. Czy kontynuować?", _ "Odbudowa operacji na transakcjach", vbYesNo, vbQuestion) = vbYes then
'usunięcie zabezpieczenia odbudowy trop dim pGlobProf : set pGlobProf = nx_get_globprofile_obj(GLOBPROF_REBUILD_TRANS_OPER) if pGlobProf is nothing then set pGlobProf = trans_.newobj(TYPEID_GLOBPROFILE) pGlobProf.indeks = clng(GLOBPROF_REBUILD_TRANS_OPER) end if pGlobProf.Wartosc = cstr(0) if not trans_.saveobjects then exit function end if
'usunięcie straych trop'ów trans_.execsql "delete from n5transakcja_operacja"
'odbudowa trop doc_.getmodule(60121).rebuild_trops end if end function
function create_missing_dostawa_in_2018 create_missing_dostawa 2018 end function
function create_missing_dostawa_in_2019 create_missing_dostawa 2019 end function
function create_missing_dostawa_in_2017 create_missing_dostawa 2017 end function function create_missing_dostawa_in_2016 create_missing_dostawa 2016 end function function create_missing_dostawa_in_2015 create_missing_dostawa 2015 end function function create_missing_dostawa_in_2014 create_missing_dostawa 2014 end function function create_missing_dostawa(iRok) trans_.var(GVAR_OPERATION_MODE) = clng(OPERATION_MODE_IMPORT)
dim idRejFVS:idRejFVS = choose_rejestr_dok("N5REJESTRDOK_FAKT_SP, N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_FAKT_SP, N5REJESTRDOK_WDT, N5REJESTRDOK_KOREKTA_WDT" , false , "Wybierz rejestr faktur")
trans_.var(APPVAR_REJESTR_TYP) = clng(N5REJESTRDOK_DOSTAWA) dim idRejDost:idRejDost = choose_rejestr_dok(N5REJESTRDOK_DOSTAWA , true , "Wybierz rejestr dostaw") trans_.var(APPVAR_REJESTR_DOKUMENTOW) = clng(idRejDost)
dim oDocRS : set oDocRS = trans_.createadors( _ "select idobj from n5sprzedaz where year(ddatawyst) = " + cstr(iRok) +_ "and sprzed_pDostawa = 0 " +_ "and pRejestrDok = " + cstr(idRejFVS) +_ "and idobj not in (select pPopSprzed from n5sprzedaz where sprzed_pDostawa <> 0) " +_ "order by strNrDok")
'trans_.autorollback false
do while not oDocRS.EOF dim idFV : idFV = clng(oDocRS(0)) trans_.message 0,0, "id=" + cstr(idFV)
dim pSprzedaz: set pSprzedaz = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ, idFV) dim pDostawa : set pDostawa = trans_.newobj(TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ) pDostawa.n5sprzedaz_copy_from_org pSprzedaz pDostawa.strExtra1 = "" set pSprzedaz.sprzed_pDostawa = pDostawa
oDocRS.MoveNext create_missing_dostawa = trans_.saveobjects() if not create_missing_dostawa then trans_.message 0,0, "FAILED create_missing_dostawa" exit function end if loop
create_missing_dostawa = true trans_.message 0,0, "SUCCESSED create_missing_dostawa"
end function

body.button: Aktualizacja cen i wartości (system też sam to robi)
Kompletna odbudowa stanów mag. z dokumentów (czasochłonne)
Odbudowa stanów mag. z OZNACZONYCH dokumentów
